basic_details.short_information: Odisha Power Transmission Corporation (OPTCL) Consultant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on 17 June 2026 on the official website www.optcl.co.in. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the OPTCL Consultant Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 63 years for all posts.

qualification.details: Consultant for 765/400 kV Sub-station: B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. (Engineering) in Electrical Engineering from a recognized Institution/University. Consultant for 765/400 kV Transmission Line: B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. (Engineering) in Electrical Engineering from a recognized Institution/University.

salary_details.details: Rs. 3,50,000/- to Rs. 5,00,000/- per month for both Consultant posts.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for OPTCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://www.optcl.co.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: OPTCL Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the OPTCL Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download OPTCL Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: OPTCL Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Consultant for 765/400 kV Sub-station: B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. (Engineering) in Electrical Engineering from a recognized Institution/University. Consultant for 765/400 kV Transmission Line: B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. (Engineering) in Electrical Engineering from a recognized Institution/University.

content_sections.heading: OPTCL Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 63 years for all posts.

content_sections.heading: OPTCL Recruitment 2026 - Salary
content_sections.text: Rs. 3,50,000/- to Rs. 5,00,000/- per month for both Consultant posts.

rows.event: Last Date for Receipt of Application

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for OPTCL Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://www.optcl.co.in/. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 16-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the OPTCL Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the offline application form for the OPTCL Consultant positions is 16th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.Tech./B.E./B.Sc. (Engineering) in Electrical Engineering from a recognized Institution or University to be eligible for these posts.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Consultant positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies for the Consultant posts in the Odisha Power Transmission Corporation (OPTCL) recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for the Consultant posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Consultant positions is 63 years. There is no minimum age limit specified.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Consultant roles?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Consultant positions will receive a salary ranging from Rs. 3,50,000/- to Rs. 5,00,000/- per month.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for the OPTCL Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the OPTCL Consultant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Consultant posts will be based on a Personal Interview.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the OPTCL Consultant positions?
faq.answer: Applications need to be submitted offline. Candidates should download the application form from the official website, fill it correctly, attach necessary documents, and send it to the address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q9. Is this a government job?
faq.answer: Yes, this is a government job opportunity with the Odisha Power Transmission Corporation (OPTCL), a state government undertaking.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for these Consultant positions?
faq.answer: The positions for Consultant are on a contractual basis.
